response: 1511 is prime. It has no divisors up to its square root (~38.9), as it passes checks for all primes up to 37.
reasoning_content: We need to check if 1511 is a prime number. Quick sanity check: 1511 is odd, not divisible by 3 (sum digits 1+5+1+1=8, not divisible by 3), not divisible by 5 (last digit not 0 or 5), check divisibility by 7: 7*215=1505, remainder 6, so not divisible. 11: 11*137=1507, remainder 4, not divisible. 13: 13*116=1508, remainder 3; 13*117=1521 too high. 17: 17*88=1496, remainder 15; 17*89=1513 too high. 19: 19*79=1501, remainder 10; 19*80=1520. 23: 23*65=1495, remainder 16; 23*66=1518. 29: 29*52=1508, remainder 3; 29*53=1537. 31: 31*48=1488, remainder 23; 31*49=1519. 37: 37*40=1480, remainder 31; 37*41=1517. 41: 41*36=1476, remainder 35; 41*37=1517. 43: 43*35=1505, remainder 6; 43*36=1548. 47: 47*32=1504, remainder 7; 47*33=1551. 53: 53*28=1484, remainder 27; 53*29=1537. 59: 59*25=1475, remainder 36; 59*26=1534. 61: 61*24=1464, remainder 47; 61*25=1525. 67: 67*22=1474, remainder 37; 67*23=1541. 71: 71*21=1491, remainder 20; 71*22=1562. 73: 73*20=1460, remainder 51; 73*21=1533. 79: 79*19=1501, remainder 10; 79*20=1580. 83: 83*18=1494, remainder 17; 83*19=1577. 89: 89*16=1424, remainder 87; 89*17=1513. 97: 97*15=1455, remainder 56; 97*16=1552. 101: 101*14=1414, remainder 97; 101*15=1515. 103: 103*14=1442, remainder 69; 103*15=1545. 107: 107*14=1498, remainder 13; 107*15=1605. 109: 109*13=1417, remainder 94; 109*14=1526. 113: 113*13=1469, remainder 42; 113*14=1582. 127: 127*11=1397, remainder 114; 127*12=1524. 131: 131*11=1441, remainder 70; 131*12=1572. 137: 137*11=1507, remainder 4; 137*12=1644. 139: 139*10=1390, remainder 121; 139*11=1529. 149: 149*10=1490, remainder 21; 149*11=1639. 151: 151*10=1510, remainder 1; so 1511 = 151*10 +1, not divisible. Actually sqrt(1511) is about 38.87, so we only need to check primes up to 37. Already checked up to 37. So 1511 is prime? Let's double-check divisibility by 17 we did, by 19, by 23, by 29, by 31, by 37. 37*40=1480, 37*41=1517, so not divisible. So it seems prime. But let's also check 1511 mod 13: 13*116=1508, remainder 3. mod 17: 17*88=1496, remainder 15. mod 19: 19*79=1501, remainder 10. mod 23: 23*65=1495, remainder 16. mod 29: 29*52=1508, remainder 3. mod 31: 31*48=1488, remainder 23. mod 37: 37*40=1480, remainder 31. So no divisors. Also check 41? sqrt is ~38.9, so primes up to 37 are enough. So 1511 is prime. However, let's also check 1511 mod 7: 7*215=1505, remainder 6. mod 11: 11*137=1507, remainder 4. So all good. So answer: 1511 is prime.
